summary: Regression run after code-review fixes. All 11 backend pytest cases pass. Both HIGH-priority frontend bugs from iteration_2 are FIXED: (1) hero-search-specialty Input now propagates ?specialty=Dentiste to /recherche and filters results to 1 dentist; (2) header-logout-btn now calls POST /api/auth/logout (200), clears auth cookies (verified 0 auth cookies remain), and a subsequent visit to /dashboard correctly redirects to /connexion. End-to-end booking + cancel flow confirmed working with 'Annulé' badge and 'Rendez-vous annulé' toast.

issues: Clicking the practitioner card body itself (the wrapper with data-testid=practitioner-card-{id}) does not navigate to the profile page; only the inner 'Voir disponibilités' link is clickable. Most users will expect the whole card to be clickable. Minor UX inconsistency — not blocking.

passed_flows: Backend: auth register/login/me/logout cycle, /me returns 401 after logout
Backend: booking create, double-book 409, cancel flips to 'cancelled', practitioner role gets 403
Frontend: hero-search-specialty='Dentiste' -> /recherche?specialty=Dentiste with 1 filtered result + Leaflet map
Frontend: practitioner profile slot click as anonymous -> /connexion, then login returns to profile
Frontend: booking-dialog confirm -> /dashboard with new appt + 'Rendez-vous' toast
Frontend: cancel-{id} moves appt to Historique with 'ANNULÉ' badge
Frontend (CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED): header-logout-btn -> /api/auth/logout 200 -> cookies cleared -> /dashboard redirects to /connexion
action_items: Optional UX polish: make the whole [data-testid=practitioner-card-*] wrapper clickable (Link) instead of only the inner 'Voir disponibilités' anchor.
critical_code_review_comments: Logout flow now correctly invokes backend, sets Set-Cookie with max_age=0 samesite=none secure=true; verified via Playwright that browser context cookies are empty post-logout.
Hero search is an Input (not Radix Select) — confirmed; previous iteration_2 finding was a misidentification by tester, no code fix was required for that piece.
seed_data_creation: Created/cancelled a Dr. Antoine Moreau appointment for Marie Démo as part of E2E (now in Historique as ANNULÉ).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All previously reported HIGH bugs resolved. Only minor UX nit remaining: card body not clickable on search results. No further regression needed unless new features added.
rca of the issue: Iteration_2 logout failure root cause: backend /api/auth/logout was deleting the cookie without explicit samesite/secure attributes matching the original Set-Cookie, so the browser kept the cookie. Fix in server.py now writes an expiring cookie with samesite=none; secure=true; max_age=0, matching the login cookie attributes. Verified: 200 response + empty browser cookie jar + /me returns 401 + PrivateRoute redirects /dashboard -> /connexion.
